hub_subtitle: Business English for global coffee trading

lesson.menu_desc: Simple past: was/were & regular verbs -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- My Past, My Path: Simple Past with To Be and Regular Verbs
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Fernanda Gabriela Silva Rodrigues | Aula 9 -- My Past, My Path

listenings.text: Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel with a quick note about Ana from the trading team. Ana started her career in 2015. Before Sucafina, she worked at a small coffee company in Brazil. In 2018, she joined our team in the trading office. Last year, she helped with a big project, and the company promoted her. The contract for the new supplier was signed in March. It was a great achievement for the team. Thank you.

Hi, this is Fernanda. Here is my update about my own path. I started my career in 2016. Before Sucafina, I worked at a local company. Last year, I joined the trading team and I helped with two projects. The training was difficult, but it was a good experience. My first big responsibility was the new contract. It was signed last week. I was very happy. Thank you.

extra_audio.text: Here is Ana's story. First, she started her career in 2015. Then, she worked at a small coffee company. Next, she joined Sucafina in 2018. Finally, last year the company promoted her.
